name: What evidence do I need to prove a law firm used faulty AI for my referral?
description: Retainers, emails, firm AI admissions; NY mandates disclosure.[5][8]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to prove a law firm used faulty AI for my referral?

acceptedAnswer.text: Retainers, emails, firm AI admissions; NY mandates disclosure.[5][8]
acceptedAnswer.description: Retainer agreements, emails showing AI intake questions, firm website admitting AI use, and case denial letters linking to mismatches. Firms use AI like Finch for pre-litigation autopilot, which can err.[5] Key factors: screenshots of AI chats if accessible, witness statements, expert testimony on AI flaws. NY courts require AI disclosure in filings.[8] Subpoena firm records in suit.
